description: Build an agent that takes a city name and reports its current weather in one friendly sentence, and refuses if the city is not real.
Build an agent that splits a restaurant bill evenly across a number of people, including a tip percentage, and returns the per-person amount.
Build an agent that converts a temperature between Celsius and Fahrenheit, and declines requests it cannot convert.
Build an agent that calculates the tip on a bill given a percentage and returns both the tip and the total.
Build an agent that answers simple factual questions it can verify with its tools, and explicitly declines to guess when it cannot.
